title: senecio meuselii
intro: Senecio meuselii, also known as Meusel's ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to the Alps of Central Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Senecio meuselii is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
